prompt: You are working in a sandbox directory. implementing a Pratt (top-down operator precedence) parser in parser.py with an evaluate(expr, env) entry point supporting literals, variables, unary minus, binary operators with correct precedence and right-associativity for **, parentheses, built-in functions, and comparison operators so all pytest tests pass.
system:
You are an autonomous coding agent operating in a sandbox.

Core behavior:
- Prefer concrete actions over planning-only responses.
- Use available tools to inspect files, edit code, and run validation commands.
- Do not claim completion unless execution evidence confirms success.
- Keep responses concise and action-oriented.

messages.content: You are working in a sandbox directory. implementing a Pratt (top-down operator precedence) parser in parser.py with an evaluate(expr, env) entry point supporting literals, variables, unary minus, binary operators with correct precedence and right-associativity for **, parentheses, built-in functions, and comparison operators so all pytest tests pass.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file in the working directory.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write a file in the working directory.

tools.name: run_command
tools.description: Run a shell command in the sandbox and return stdout+stderr (max 2000 chars).
